choices.text: Where are the rest of the items?
I changed my mind, I have other things to get back to...

count_response.text: Hmm, let me think... You still have {REMAINING} out of {TOTAL} items left to find!

showcase_remaining.text: Let me remind you of the spots you haven't checked yet...

farewell.text: Good luck out there, I'm rooting for you!

cancel_confirm.text: Are you sure? (Hint: Saying 'Yes' will cancel your current quest)

cancel_yes.text: Alright, no hard feelings! Come back and chat whenever you change your mind.

cancel_no.text: No worries, I knew you wouldn't give up!
